text:
Former US President Donald Trump has criticized the opening ceremony of the Summer Olympics in Paris, calling it a "disgrace" due to a scene that parodied Leonardo da Vinci's painting "The Last Supper." House Speaker Mike Johnson also condemned the event, stating that it was shocking and insulting to Christian people worldwide.

description: Former US President Donald Trump has criticized the opening ceremony of the Summer Olympics in Paris, calling it a "disgrace" due to a scene that parodied Leonardo da Vinci's painting "The Last Supper."
